sp_widget.name: ENAMS VPN Request
sp_widget.template:
VPN Access Request

Secure remote access to enterprise resources through the Enterprise Network Access Management System.

Who Can Request?

Employees, contractors, and authorized users requiring secure remote connectivity to enterprise resources.

Requirements

  • Manager Approval
  • Business Justification
  • Valid Employee ID
  • Corporate Device (if applicable)

Processing Time

VPN requests are generally fulfilled within 1–2 business days after approval.
